problem id: 739451ab
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  01011001 -> 00010111
  01001000 -> 10111111
  11101111 -> 01100111
  00100101 -> 01110111
  00101000 -> 10111111
  01101101 -> 00110111
  11001010 -> 11101111
  11100010 -> 10101111

query: 00010100
predicted answer: 11011111
